subsections.text: In addition to other equipment required by this chapter:
a bus, truck, trailer, or semitrailer that is at least 80 inches wide shall be equipped with:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: two clearance lamps on the front, one at each side;

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: two clearance lamps on the rear, one at each side;

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: four side marker lamps, one on each side at or near the front and one on each side at or near the rear;

subsections.label: D
subsections.text: four reflectors, one on each side at or near the front and one on each side at or near the rear; and

subsections.label: E
subsections.text: hazard lamps that meet the requirements of Section 547.331 (Hazard Lamps Permitted) ;
a bus or truck that is at least 30 feet long shall be equipped with hazard lamps that meet the requirements of Section 547.331 (Hazard Lamps Permitted) ;
a trailer or semitrailer that is at least 30 feet long shall be equipped with:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: two side marker lamps, one centrally mounted on each side with respect to the length of the vehicle;

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: two reflectors, one centrally mounted on each side with respect to the length of the vehicle; and

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: hazard lamps that meet the requirements of Section 547.331 (Hazard Lamps Permitted) ;
a pole trailer shall be equipped with:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: two side marker lamps, one at each side at or near the front of the load;

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: one reflector at or near the front of the load;

subsections.label: C
subsections.text: one combination marker lamp that:

subsections.label: i
subsections.text: emits an amber light to the front and a red light to the rear and side; and

subsections.label: ii
subsections.text: is mounted on the rearmost support for the load to indicate the maximum width of the trailer; and

subsections.label: D
subsections.text: hazard lamps that meet the requirements of Section 547.331 (Hazard Lamps Permitted) , if the pole trailer is at least 30 feet long or at least 80 inches wide;
a truck-tractor shall be equipped with:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: two clearance lamps, one at each side on the front of the cab; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: hazard lamps that meet the requirements of Section 547.331 (Hazard Lamps Permitted) , if the truck-tractor is at least 30 feet long or at least 80 inches wide; and
a vehicle at least 80 inches wide may be equipped with:

subsections.label: A
subsections.text: not more than three front identification lamps without glare; and

subsections.label: B
subsections.text: not more than three rear identification lamps without glare.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
